zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John de Brewse於大約1332年出生在英國諾福爾可時，他的父親Sir John de Braose - Lord of Stinton and Ludborough Sr27歲，母親Agnes Eva de Ufford28歲。他於1370年之前與Joan Shardelow結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1394年享年63歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可伍德布里奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John de Brewse于大约1332年出生在英国諾福爾可时，他的父亲Sir John de Braose - Lord of Stinton and Ludborough Sr27岁，母亲Agnes Eva de Ufford28岁。他于1370年之前与Joan Shardelow结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1394年享年63岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可伍德布里奇。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Brewse
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of German and Danish   Kruse   or Dutch   Kroese  .

variants.name: Cruse
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name probably from an unidentified place in Normandy named with Old French crues, crus, creus ‘hollow’. Creuse (in Somme, Picardy) and Cruys-Straëte (formerly in Flanders, now in the French département of Nord), which have the same etymology, are alternative possibilities but seem less likely on geographical and tenurial grounds.
English: perhaps a nickname from Middle English crus(e) ‘bold, fierce’, although the regular development would be to Crowse (rhyming with house).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John de Brewse was born about 1332, in Norfolk, England, his father, Sir John de Braose - Lord of Stinton and Ludborough Sr, was 27 and his mother, Agnes Eva de Ufford, was 28. He married Joan Shardelow before 1370. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died in 1394, at the age of 63, and was buried in Woodbridge, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John de Brewse est né environ 1332, à Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir John de Braose - Lord of Stinton and Ludborough Sr, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Agnes Eva de Ufford, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Joan Shardelow avant 1370. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1394, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à Woodbridge, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John de Brewse um 1332 in Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John de Braose - Lord of Stinton and Ludborough Sr 27 und seine Mutter Agnes Eva de Ufford 28. Er hat vor 1370 Joan Shardelow geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1394 im Alter von 63 Jahren und wurde in Woodbridge, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de Brewse è nato il circa 1332 nel Norfolk, England, il suo padre, Sir John de Braose - Lord of Stinton and Ludborough Sr, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Eva de Ufford, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Joan Shardelow prima del 1370. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1394, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolto a Woodbridge, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John de Brewseが約1332年にイギリスノーフォルクで生まれた時，父Sir John de Braose - Lord of Stinton and Ludborough Srは27歳，母Agnes Eva de Uffordは28歳であった。1370年以前にJoan Shardelowと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1394年に63歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクウッドブリッジにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John de Brewse(이)가 대략 1332년 영국 노르폴크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John de Braose - Lord of Stinton and Ludborough Sr(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Eva de Ufford(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1370년 이전 Joan Shardelow(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1394년 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 우드브리지에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de Brewse nasceu aproximadamente 1332, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John de Braose - Lord of Stinton and Ludborough Sr, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Eva de Ufford, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Shardelow antes 1370. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1394, com 63 anos, e foi sepultado em Woodbridge, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John de Brewse родился около 1332 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John de Braose - Lord of Stinton and Ludborough Sr было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Eva de Ufford, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Shardelow перед 1370 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1394 г. в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности вудбридж, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John de Brewse nació aproximadamente 1332, en Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John de Braose - Lord of Stinton and Ludborough Sr, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Agnes Eva de Ufford, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Joan Shardelow antes de 1370. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en 1394, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultado en Woodbridge, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
